name: Multi-Facility Emergency Contact Replacement
description: The Tri-County Water Authority needs to update emergency contact information across its regional water treatment facilities. Michael Scarn (the previous primary responder) has retired. You must update the Tier II portfolio to assign the new Director of Operations, Sarah Jenkins, as the primary emergency contact for all three water treatment plants in the system, and completely remove Michael Scarn's old record. Using the EPA Tier2 Submit application (already open), import the facility portfolio data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\water_portfolio_baseline.t2s. Navigate to the Contacts module or the facilities, add Sarah Jenkins (Title: Director of Operations, Phone: 555-019-8822, 24-Hour Phone: 555-019-9933, Email: sjenkins@tricountywater.org). Link her as Emergency Contact #1 for all three facilities (North Water Treatment Plant, South Water Treatment Plant, West Pump Station). Finally, delete Michael Scarn from the system entirely. Run the validation check, then export the entire submission to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\updated_portfolio_2025.t2s.
